title: Badgers eye finals in T20 semi-final
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers will face the ACDC Tuskers, whom they've already beaten this season, in the semi-final of the Cricket South Africa Division 2 knockout competition today, Thursday 17 October.


> Despite a tough start for the Badgers, losing their first two matches, they managed to bounce back with three consecutive victories to keep their hopes of a place in the finals alive.


The outcomes of the last round of pool matches in the competition were determined last Saturday. At the conclusion of the preliminary round, Eastern Storm lead the table at 20 points followed by the Tuskers at 17 points and the Badgers third at 15 points.

The Northern Cape Heat – after a bonus point victory in Kimberley against the Limpopo Impala on Saturday – have 13 points and finished fourth.

The schedule for the semi-finals is:

Wednesday 16 October: Eastern Storm vs Northern Cape Heat in Benoni

Thursday 17 October: ACDC Tuskers vs Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers in Pietermaritzburg

The venue that will host the final on Sunday 20 October will also be decided this weekend. Should the Northern Cape Heat and the Badgers win, the Recreation Ground in Oudtshoorn will be the venue, but if Eastern Storm win against Northern Cape Heat, they will host the final.

The Badgers will finalise their starting eleven when assessing the conditions in Pietermaritzburg.


> Promotion and Reserve leagues


The summarised scorecards in the Six Gun Grill SWD Promotion and Reserve leagues are:

Promotion League

Ramblers vs NMU

Ramblers 328/5 (50 overs); NMU 202 all out (38.4 overs)

Ramblers won by 126 runs.

NMU vs Pirates United

NMU 305/9 (50 overs); Pirates United 199 all out (42 overs)

NMU won by 106 runs.

Reserve League: Division 1

Dysselsdorp vs Union Stars B

Union Stars B 201 all out (42.5 overs); Dysselsdorp 191 all out (38 overs)

Union Stars B won by 10 runs.

Blanco vs Kwanonqaba

Blanco 455/5 (50 overs); Kwanonqaba 22 all out (10.4 overs)

Blanco won by 433 runs.

Albertinia vs Mayflower

Albertinia 139 all out (36.4 overs); Mayflower 71 all out (18.3 overs)

Albertinia won by 68 runs.

Hartenbos vs Headliners

Hartenbos 267 all out (42.4 overs); Headliners 52 all out (10 overs)

Hartenbos won 215 runs.

Reserve League: Division 2

Knysna Cavaliers C vs Plett Pioneers C

Plett Pioneers C 29 all out (16.1 overs)

Knysna Cavaliers C 35/1 (7.1 overs)

Knysna Cavaliers C won by 9 wickets.

Plett Pioneers B vs Kranshoek Cobras B

Plett Pioneers B vs Kranshoek Cobras 147/5 (26.5 overs)

Kranshoek Cobras B won by 5 wickets.

Beaufort West vs Harlequins Forces B

Beaufort West 296 all out (33.1 overs)

Harlequins Forces B 73 all out (17 overs)

Beaufort West won by 223 runs.

Hartenbos B vs Sussex C

Sussex C 131 all out (36.4 overs); Hartenbos B 132/2 (19.3 overs)

Hartenbos B won by 8 wickets.

Mossel Bay B vs Sussex B

Sussex B 96 all out (24 overs); Mossel Bay B 100/5 (19 overs)

Mossel Bay B won by 5 wickets.

George C vs George D

George D 192/7 (40 overs); George C 193/4 (30.2 overs)

George C won by 6 wickets.

Pacaltsdorp United C vs Ramblers B

Ramblers B 215 all out (38.4 overs)

Pacaltsdorp United C 147 all out (28 overs)

Ramblers B won by 68 runs.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
